_comment: v7.1 BX schema (2026-04-26 — Sahil push for 8+ shots, no more 3-shot half-empty carousel). Major discovery: BX has separate URLs for each adventure level (/bloxplode%20adventure%20level%20N/) and classic mode at /classic/. That gives us 8 reachable shots without dev-hooks: menu + adventure-map + classic + 5 different adventure levels (1, 3, 5, 7, 10 — spread across difficulty curve, each with its own theme palette). Combo / best-score / revive HERO shots still gated on Bloxplode-Beta #72-#76 — those 5 are the dopamine peaks but the carousel is no longer half-empty.
hook_order: variety (5 different adventure levels, each themed)
combo-dopamine (BLOCKED on #72-#76 — combo hero shot would lead carousel when unlocked)

deferred_until_dev_hooks.comment: 2 hero shots blocked on Bloxplode-Beta #72-#76: combo-x4 mid-explosion + best-score-celebration with crown. These would lead the carousel as #1 (combo) and #2 (mastery) per BX hook ordering. Until they ship, the 8-shot carousel above leads with brand + progression instead of dopamine — passable but not optimal. Once dev-hooks land: combo shots move to #1-#2, current shots shift down, total expands to 10.
